CVE-2017-17536.title: Phabricator before 2017-11-10 does not block the --config and --d ...
CVE-2017-17536.description: Phabricator before 2017-11-10 does not block the --config and --debugger flags to the Mercurial hg program, which allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code by using the web UI to browse a branch whose name begins with a --config= or --debugger= substring.
